# int / storage

The **int** type's storage capability: contributes `Fields.Storage` (server
runtime) mapping the `int` field token to a Postgres `integer` column via
`build(name) => integer(name)`. Resolved by exact token through
`resolveFieldStorage("int")`.

<!-- AUTOGENERATED:BEGIN — do not edit; regenerated by `./singularity build` -->

## Plugin reference

- Description: Integer field type: DB storage capability — maps to a Postgres integer column.
- Server:
  - Contributes: `fields.storage` "int"
  - Uses: `fields/server-capabilities.Fields`
- Cross-plugin:
  - Imported by: `fields/server-capabilities-loader`
